description:
* Delivered enhancements to Java-based legacy reference data applications (PME Fusion), improving the system stability and maintainability.
* Built a Spring Boot–based automation framework for SQL testing, reducing manual effort and accelerating validation cycles.
* Developed a Spring Boot API testing tool to load and validate ARMS cache data, improving test reliability and consistency.
* Owned release and deployment activities, including Octane test case coordination, ensuring smooth and timely production releases.

* Architected and delivered event-driven microservices to consolidate swap data (exceptions, dividends, holdings) from multiple upstream services, improving data consistency and timeliness for downstream consumers.
 * Drove cross-functional requirement alignment by proactively clarifying complex business rules with business analysts and upstream/downstream teams, reducing ambiguity and accelerating delivery.
 * Integrated a distributed microservice ecosystem using Solace messaging, improving reliability and scalability of inter-service communication.
 * Led collaboration across globally distributed teams in India, the US, and Spain to coordinate execution, unblock dependencies, and deliver milestones on schedule.

* Built a cache synchronization service to keep cached data aligned with real-time database changes, improving data accuracy and consistency across the platform.
 * Designed and implemented an entity persistence framework on Redis, reducing direct database dependency and improving throughput and response times.
 * Developed an automated cache-cleanup service to evict stale and unused entities, optimizing memory utilization and cache efficiency.
 * Improved platform performance through targeted load testing and JProfiler-based tuning, and architected a robust fix for a race condition between two applications to increase system stability.
